logistics.format: Practical exam with hand-marked written report (passing 70%+, gold coin 90%+); covers Malware Analysis, Threat Hunting, Advanced SIEM, Vulnerability Management; 4 years validity

recommended_certs.rationale: Security Blue Team recommends BTL1 prior to BTL2 although not formally required.

evaluation.rationale: All three personas agree at this tier; rationale reflects consensus.
